quotes.text: I don't compete on features. I compete on speed. Ship in days, not months.
quotes.author: Marc Lou

quotes.text: Your competitors aren't your problem. Your customers' indifference is your problem.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your competition isn't other products. Your competition is 'doing nothing.' Most customers choose that.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your competitors will copy your features. They can't copy your taste. Build something with taste.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every successful business started with someone saying 'I can do this better.' Most businesses fail because 'better' isn't enough.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to beat competition is to not have any. Build something so unique that there's nothing to compare it to.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to compete with big companies is to be faster, more personal, and more focused. You can't outspend them.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your competition isn't other products. It's inertia. Most people choose to do nothing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to beat competition is to build something they can't copy: your culture, your taste, your community.
quotes.author: based
